title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at NAREDCO

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at NAREDCO
jsonLd.description:
NAREDCO, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NAREDCO:
NAREDCO is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NAREDCO!
